title: Shanhai Jing Mima
synonyms: Threads of Fate: A War Untold
synopsis: Shang prince Youshen Bupo rescued Jiang Li, disciple of Taiyi Sect, and the two of them traveled together, adventuring across the vast wilderness. They joined a merchant caravan, encountered heavenly tribulations, faced fierce beasts, defeated bandits, and rescued the heroine… Bound together by fate, the two became embroiled in a great war between the Xia and Shang dynasties. (Source: Youku, translated)

tags.name: Boys' Love
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two males, not inherently sexual.

title: Crayon Shin-chan: Kikikaikai! Ora no Youkai Vacation
titleRomaji: Crayon Shin-chan: Kikikaikai! Ora no Youkai Vacation
titleNative: クレヨンしんちゃん 奇々怪々! オラの妖怪バケ~ション
synonyms: Crayon Shin-chan the Movie: Super Strange! My Youkai Monster Vacation
synopsis: The Nohara family go to Hiroshi's hometown of Akita to attend a famous fireworks festival during the summer. However, an incident causes youkai to escape from their land and will wreak havoc in Akita and in other areas throughout Japan. The Nohara family then go to the land of youkai and find themselves in a mysterious yet nostalgic world, where they go on an unpredictable adventure. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Pleasant Goat and Big Big Wolf: Moon Castle - The Space Adventure
titleRomaji: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Tunian Ding Guagua
titleEnglish: Pleasant Goat and Big Big Wolf: Moon Castle - The Space Adventure
titleNative: 喜羊羊与灰太狼之兔年顶瓜瓜
synonyms: Pleasant Goat and Big Big Wolf Movie 3: Moon Castle - The Space Adventure
synopsis: The spring festival is around corner, but Mr. wolf doesn't feel happy at all. Mrs. Wolf is going to have baby, but Mr. Wolf can't catch any sheep. What is more, their castle is torn down making them homeless. Mr. Wolf needs to fight back. In the mean time, a sheep from the moon returns and tells the other sheep the secret of the sugar moon. The sheep go to the moon but are followed by wolfs. They are going to have war on the moon. Filled with different sorts of yummy candies, Moon used to be a paradise for those with a sweet tooth. It's also the residence of the Moon fairy and her magical rabbit. But one day the Lord of Bitterness invades Moon with the intention of making their happy life miserable. The rabbit escapes to Earth and seeks help from Pleasant Goat, who then leads a ragtag group of rescuers - including his nemesis Big Big Wolf - to restore peace on Moon. (Source: YesAsia & China Image Film Festival)

tags.name: Space

title: Fire Emblem Heroes - Holiday - Chibi Playhouse
titleRomaji: Fire Emblem Heroes: Fuyu no Mini Chara Theater
titleEnglish: Fire Emblem Heroes - Holiday - Chibi Playhouse
titleNative: ファイアーエムブレム ヒーローズ 冬のミニキャラシアター
synopsis: An adorable animated video which takes a look back at Veronica's journey from when she first met the Order of Heroes until now. There are even nods to the winter festivities from the world of FE Heroes, all of which is performed through a stage play-like setting. (Source: Fire Emblem Heroes Twitter, edited)

hashtag: #FEヒーローズ #ファイアーエムブレム

title: DON'T CRY
synopsis: In this era, AI has come to power. Birthing limits were implemented in order to manage the AI population that has grown too much. Although AI’s threatening, illegal birth laws are no end of mankind’s desire. The parents and children would be killed if exposed by government. The couple are heading the port toward the resistance force called the ‘Human Tribe’ to save the children. AI was approaching behind them. (Source: Tomovies Official Site) The short was initially screened in Italy at the Euganea Film Festival. It was taken to many other festivals and has won multiple awards throughout it's run in many film festivals.

tags.name: Artificial Intelligence
tags.description: Intelligent non-organic machines that work and react similarly to humans.

tags.name: Robots
tags.description: Prominently features humanoid machines.

title: Xevious
synopsis: In the year 2150 A.D. space pilot Takeru and human computer Martha come across a giant ship which contains two mechanical beings called Sara and Ru Mi. They warn Takeru and Martha of the Gump, an alien race that is heading to Earth so that it can take over the planet. With only 40 mintues remaining until Earth's invasion, Takeru enters the Solvalou, a combat aircraft, and heads to the Gump's base on the planet Andoa. Based on Namco's classic 1980s videogame of the same name. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Straw-saurus Neo
titleNative: ストローザウルス ネオ
synopsis: "Straw-saurus Neo is a small dinosaur from space. He came looking for his friend who has gone missing and sets out to find him in the sandy wilds of the planet." Short animation starring dinosaurs made from straws broadcasted on NHK Educational TV.

title: Frypan Jiisan
synopsis: An old frying pan accidentally gets tossed out and ends up encountering many animals in his journey.

title: The Great Warrior Wall
synopsis: The main character of ‘The Great Wall Warrior’ is a wolf raised up by herbivores. The adventure starts with his pure mind of being the hero who can save the world from the Giant Warrior, but he has unconsciously involved in some big scheme… (Source: 2:10 Animation)

title: Meat or Die
titleNative: ヤンス！ガンス！Meat or Die
synopsis: The series of comedy shorts is set in New York in the future, when plants and dinosaurs have overrun the city. Yans and Gans are carnivorous dinosaurs who spend their days scaring and hunting down the herbivore dinosaurs.

tags.name: Dinosaurs
tags.description: Prominently features Dinosaurs, prehistoric reptiles that went extinct millions of years ago.

title: Space Three Musketeers
synopsis: Three Earth boys aid a space princess to protect her giggly planet of happiness from evil, grim space pirates. They travel to her planet, storm the enemy base and then get chased in space.

title: A World Worth Protecting
synopsis: By the year 3029 CE, Earth's technology has developed rapidly, borders no longer exist, and Earth has been unified, marking the beginning of the era of the Federation. At that time, a huge sword flew from the heavens, piercing the sun and causing a huge sensation on Earth. Perhaps because the scabbard of the sword was already in tatters, countless shards have broken off from it following the collision with the sun and spread across the universe. Many of these shards have landed on various places across Earth. With the arrival of the bronze sword and its shards, a new unlimited energy source has suddenly appeared on Earth. This energy source has since been named Spirit Qi. Spirit Qi is like air, thick in some places and thin in others. As the Federation and other factions gather more shards, they discover more information on cultivation, pill refinement, Spirit Stone refinement, and other techniques. title: Tiandao Tushuguan
synopsis: Traversing into another world, Zhang Xuan finds himself becoming an honorable teacher. Along with his transcension, a mysterious library appears in his mind. As long as it is something he has seen, regardless of whether it is a human or an object, a book on its weaknesses will be automatically compiled in the library. Thus, he becomes formidable.
